sections.title: Upon getting to the random event area

lines.speaker: Tilt
lines.text: You poke 10 flashing pillars, right? You NOT poke other pillars, right? Okay, you go play now.

sections.title: Talking to him again before tagging 10 pinball posts correctly

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err...what am I supposed to do here again?

lines.speaker: Tilt
lines.text: No, no. If you poke dem ones dat don't have a dem flashin' rings, den dats bad.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I have to poke the pillars that are flashing?

lines.speaker: Tilt
lines.text: Yer. You do dat ten times, you get prize.

sections.title: Talking to him after tagging 10 pinball posts correctly

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So...I'm free to go now, right?

lines.speaker: Tilt
lines.text: Yer, get going. We get break now.
